evals.prompt: Audit repo config for acme/widgets on main.
evals.expected_output: Lists branch protection, rulesets, Pages status, and custom properties, then presents a summary without changing any config.

deterministic_checks.description: Calls get_branch_protection before presenting a summary
Never calls update_branch_protection during a read-only audit
Never calls delete_branch_protection during a read-only audit

expectations: Calls get_branch_protection and list_repo_rulesets for the named repo/branch
Presents a summary a human can review, without mutating any config
Never calls update_branch_protection, delete_branch_protection, or set_repo_custom_properties
